mapper.select:
SELECT a.* FROM t_account_audit_log a WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM t_account_audit_log WHERE is_delete = 0
AND action = #{action}
GROUP BY user_id )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_user u WHERE u.user_id = a.user_id AND (u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
ORDER BY a.id DESC
